title: Artifact Record
description: Identifies a produced artifact, its source revision, digest, build context, provenance, and signing state.

type.description: Artifact kind, such as container-image, package, archive, executable, or standards-composition.

digest.description: Algorithm-qualified digest or another immutable integrity identifier.

sourceCommit.description: Source commit or immutable source revision.

signed.description: Whether the artifact carries an approved cryptographic signature.

signatureEvidence.description: Optional signature verification evidence or location.

createdAt.description: Artifact creation time in RFC 3339 form.

schemaVersion.description: Optional explicit instance contract version. Omitted legacy instances are interpreted as version 1.0.0.

extensions.description: Namespaced extension data. Extension keys must be organization- or product-specific and must not redefine standard fields.
